scripts.wasm:build: cd ../.. && cargo build -p pdfeditor-core --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --features wasm --release && wasm-bindgen target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/pdfeditor_core.wasm --target web --out-dir apps/web/src/wasm --out-name pdfeditor_core
scripts.build: npm run wasm:build && vue-tsc --noEmit && vite build
